name: PubSex (Sequel)
description:
New Eridu's Public Security has made blunder after blunder lately, forcing the government to either cut their budget or pay reparations to the community. They opted for the latter and sex certificates are sent out regularly to every citizen. PubSec has been rebranded to PubSex and every officer's body is available to use while in their HQ. They do still have work to do, so they'll remain focused on that if they can. Artist: Unfairr https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/44922986

For those that question the image, you should use the report button instead. A moderator would have more impact than a simple dislike and could actually remove the bot if they find it offensive.
creator: billyboy7372
